move.name: Move Away!
move.exp: When your King is attacked, MOVE it to a safe square the enemy cannot reach!

block.name: Block!
block.exp: If a Rook, Bishop or Queen attacks your King in a straight line, PUT A PIECE IN BETWEEN to block!

capture.name: Capture!
capture.exp: Sometimes you can TAKE the piece attacking your King! Capture it and the check is over!

protect.name: Protect!
protect.exp: Before the enemy takes your piece, DEFEND it so if they capture, you can recapture back.

move.task: King on E8 is in CHECK from Rook on E1! Move to safety!
move.hint: E-file is dangerous! Try D7, D8, F7 or F8.

move.task: Black King on H8 is in CHECK from Rook H6! Escape!
move.hint: H-file is dangerous! Move to G8 or G7.
move.explain: G8 or G7 — off the H-file!

move.task: King on D8 in CHECK from Queen D6! Find a safe escape!
move.hint: D-file is dangerous! Try C7 or E7.
move.explain: King to C7 or E7 escapes!

block.task: Black King on G8 in CHECK from Rook G6! Tap the BLOCKING square!
block.hint: Only G7 sits between G6 and G8.
block.explain: G7 is the only blocking square!

block.task: White King on H1 in CHECK from Black Rook D1! Tap a BLOCKING square!
block.explain: Placing a piece on E1-G1 blocks the check!

block.task: King on E8 in CHECK from Queen E1! Tap a BLOCKING square!
block.hint: Any square between E2-E7 blocks it.
block.explain: Blocking puts a piece between attacker and King!

capture.task: King on G1 in CHECK from Rook G2! King can CAPTURE it — tap the Rook!
capture.hint: Rook on G2 is right next to the King — step to G2!
capture.explain: King captured the Rook on G2!

capture.task: King in CHECK from Queen F6! White Rook can CAPTURE it! Tap the Queen!
capture.hint: Rook on F2 slides up to F6!
capture.explain: Rook takes Queen — check gone AND you win the Queen!

capture.task: King in CHECK from Rook D5! Go sideways — D4 is still dangerous!
capture.hint: Move to C3, E3, C4 or E4.
capture.explain: Moving sideways escapes the D-file check!

protect.task: Black Queen threatens your Rook D3! PROTECT the Rook — tap a defending piece!
protect.hint: King can step closer to D3 to defend it.
protect.explain: King defends the Rook! Now Queen taking Rook loses to King recapture!

protect.task: Black Bishop threatens your Pawn F4! PROTECT it!
protect.hint: King on D1 can step to E2 to defend.
protect.explain: King stepping to E3 defends the F4 pawn!

protect.task: Black Rook attacks your Pawn D4! PROTECT it!
protect.hint: King needs to advance toward D3.
protect.explain: Moving the King toward D3 protects the pawn!
